name: hl-plugins-monorepo
description: Curated OpenCode plugins, installable with one command.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/test/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/plugin-mmx-claude/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/plugin-mmx-claude/test/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p scripts/triage/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build && npm publish --workspace packages/cli --access public
